summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Ristorantino da Matteo Italian restaurant website MVP. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Tested trilingual support (CZ/EN/IT), reservation system, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and complete user flows.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/ - API root endpoint working
Backend API: GET /api/menu - Menu data with all categories (antipasti, primi, secondi, dolci, vini)
Backend API: GET /api/info - Restaurant info with rating 4.7/303 reviews
Backend API: POST /api/reservations - Reservation creation with validation
Backend API: GET /api/reservations - Reservation retrieval
Backend API: POST /api/contact - Contact form submission
Frontend: Homepage hero section with cinematic image and CTA buttons working
Frontend: Google rating display (4.7 stars, 303 reviews) correctly shown
Frontend: Navigation menu working across all pages (Home, Menu, About, Gallery, Contact, Reservation)
Frontend: Language switcher functionality (CZ, EN, IT) working perfectly
Frontend: Menu page with categories (Antipasti, Primi, Secondi, Dolci, Vini) and category switching
Frontend: Reservation form validation (name, phone required) working
Frontend: Reservation form submission to backend API successful
Frontend: Click-to-call phone links working (tel: format correct)
Frontend: Mobile responsive design and navigation working
Frontend: Sticky reserve button visible on mobile
Frontend: All page navigation (About, Gallery, Contact) working
Frontend: Footer with contact info and social links working
Frontend: Gallery page with 8 images and Instagram link working
Frontend: Contact page with phone/email/WhatsApp links and map working
Frontend: End-to-end user flows (Homepage -> Menu -> Reservation) working
